CustomField.formula: IF(FIND( "What is better about the other solution?", Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c )=0, "", IF(FIND('","',Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c,FIND( "What is better about the other solution?", Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c )+5 )=0, RIGHT(LEFT(Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c, LEN(Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c)-2), LEN(Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c)- FIND("What is better about the other solution?",Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c)-44) , RIGHT(LEFT(Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c , FIND('","',Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c,FIND( "What is better about the other solution?", Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c )+17 )-2), FIND('","',Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c,FIND( "What is better about the other solution?", Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c )+17 )-FIND( "What is better about the other solution?", Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c )-44) ))
CustomField.label: CancellationSurvey OtherSolution
